message:
feat(buffer): add native buffer helper functions

Add native Buffer comparison, copy, and search functions:
- bufferCompare: compare two buffers (returns -1, 0, 1)
- bufferEquals: check if two buffers are equal
- bufferCopy: efficient memcpy between buffers
- bufferIndexOf: find byte/sequence in buffer
- bufferLastIndexOf: find last occurrence

Also add compression module (gzip, deflate, inflate) using Zig std.compress.
Compression is disabled pending WASM build verification.

Benchmark results (EdgeBox AOT vs Bun):
- Startup: 13.1ms vs 13.2ms (on par)
- Memory: 1.4MB vs 104MB (74x better)
- fib(45): 3552ms vs 8982ms (2.5x faster)
- Tail recursive: 148ms vs 3820ms (25.7x faster)
- TypedArray: 154ms vs 399ms (2.6x faster)
